-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09for scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09line := scanner.Text()%0A%09%09if len(line) == 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09continue%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09var left %5B%5Drune%0A%09%09var right %5B%5Drune%0A%0A%09%09for _, cmd := range line %7B%0A%09%09%09switch cmd %7B%0A%09%09%09case 'R':%0A%09%09%09%09left = append(left, '%5Cn')%0A%09%09%09case 'B':%0A%09%09%09%09if len(left) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09left = left%5B:len(left)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09case 'D':%0A%09%09%09%09if len(right) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09right = right%5B:len(right)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09case '%3C':%0A%09%09%09%09if len(left) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09right = append(right, left%5Blen(left)-1%5D)%0A%09%09%09%09%09left = left%5B:len(left)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09case '%3E':%0A%09%09%09%09if len(right) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09left = append(left, right%5Blen(right)-1%5D)%0A%09%09%09%09%09right = right%5B:len(right)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09default:%0A%09%09%09%09left = append(left, cmd)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09fmt.Print(string(left))%0A%0A%09%09fmt.Print(%22%7C%22)%0A%0A%09%09for i := len(right) - 1; i %3E= 0; i-- %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(string(right%5Bi%5D))%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09fmt.Println()%0A%09%7D
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22)
